market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Panoramic Duplex Penthouse + Parking – City View
Spacious Duplex with Parking & Panoramic Views
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to a modern duplex penthouse that combines spacious living with breathtaking panoramic views and the convenience of private parking. This entire‑home retreat comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it perfect for families, small groups, or business travelers seeking a touch of luxury. Step inside to discover a bright, open‑plan living area that showcases floor‑to‑ceiling windows framing the city skyline – an ideal backdrop for morning coffee or evening relaxation. The well‑equipped kitchen provides all the essentials for self‑catering, while the two thoughtfully designed bedrooms ensure restful nights. A dedicated parking space removes the hassle of street parking, giving you peace of mind throughout your stay. Rated 4.97 from 253 reviews, our guests consistently praise the immaculate condition, attentive host support, and the unforgettable views. At £194.40 per night, you enjoy a premium experience that sits just 11% above the city’s median rate of £175, yet our occupancy for the next 90 days stands at 37%, indicating strong demand. Book now to experience the blend of comfort, style, and convenience that makes this penthouse a standout choice for your next visit.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space – no balcony or terrace highlighted
Parking – not listed as an amenity despite being a selling point
Entertainment – absence of TV, streaming or gaming options
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution shot of the living area looking out over the city skyline as the cover photo; it instantly showcases the panoramic views and the premium feel of the penthouse.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £194.4 is 11% higher than the cohort median (£175) while occupancy is only 37% – lowering the price could capture more bookings.
The title omits location and SEO‑friendly keywords; adding the city name and key amenity can improve search visibility.
No amenities are listed despite having parking and potential outdoor space – adding these to the listing will raise the amenity score and appeal.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your 37% occupancy at a £194.4 nightly rate—11% above market—means you could boost bookings by adjusting price.
